name: Vangelis
bio: Vangelis keeps earning through soundtrack-driven catalog value, ambient listening, and recurring film-world cultural interest.
notable_for: Electronic and cinematic compositions with strong long-tail cultural value.
career_highlight: His best-known soundtrack works remain commercially relevant through sync legacy and streaming discovery.
revenue_drivers: Soundtrack-driven streaming and playlist use support recurring value.
Film legacy keeps the catalog culturally visible.
Ambient and focus listening extend long-tail demand.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Vangelis's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Vangelis's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
